zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean於1425年之前出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特洛賀布時，她的父親Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier65歲，母親Margaret MacLeod of Lewis74歲。她於1455年之前與William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾登維根結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1475年之後在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean于1425年之前出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特洛賀布时，她的父亲Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier65岁，母亲Margaret MacLeod of Lewis74岁。她于1455年之前与William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief在苏格兰音巴內-爾登維根结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1475年之后在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean was born before 1425, in Lochbuie, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier, was 65 and her mother, Margaret MacLeod of Lewis, was 74. She married William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief before 1455, in Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 1475, in Scotland.

fr.Lochbuie, Isle of Mull, Scotland: Lochbuie, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean est née avant 1425, à Lochbuie, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier, avait 65 ans et sa mère, Margaret MacLeod of Lewis, avait 74 ans. Elle a épousé William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief avant 1455, à Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1475, à Écosse.

de.Lochbuie, Isle of Mull, Scotland: Lochbuie, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean vor 1425 in Lochbuie, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier 65 und ihre Mutter Margaret MacLeod of Lewis 74. Sie hat vor 1455 in Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1475 in Scotland.

Lei sposato William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief prima del 1455, nel Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1475, nel Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLeanが1425年以前にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトロチブイで生まれた時，父Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuierは65歳，母Margaret MacLeod of Lewisは74歳であった。1455年以前にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアダンベガンでWilliam Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chiefと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1475年以後にスコットランドで死去した。

ko.Lochbuie, Isle of Mull, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 럭버이
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean(이)가 1425년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 럭버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier(은)는 65세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret MacLeod of Lewis(은)는 74세였다. 그녀는 1455년 이전 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 던베건에서 William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1475년 이후 스컷랜드에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief antes 1455, em Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1475, em Scotland.

ru.Lochbuie, Isle of Mull, Scotland: лочбуи, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean родилась перед 1425 г. в местности лочбуи, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier было 65 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret MacLeod of Lewis, 74. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief перед 1455 г. в местности дунвеган, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1475 г. в местности Шотландия.
